WHAT WE CLEAN

Our Services

From routine housekeeping to full move-out deep cleans, we tailor every job to your space and schedule.

Residential

Homes, apartments, and condos — regular or one-time cleans.

Commercial

Offices, retail, and warehouses — after-hours available.

Move-Out / Move-In

Deep cleans between tenants so you get the deposit back.

Deep Cleaning

Carpet, windows, appliances, and full sanitization.

TRANSPARENT PRICING

Pricing Tiers

Simple, upfront pricing with no hidden fees. All plans include eco-friendly products and our satisfaction guarantee.

Basic

$99per visit
  • Standard clean
  • Up to 2 rooms
  • Dusting & vacuuming
  • Bathroom & kitchen wipe-down
  • Eco-friendly products
Get Started
Most Popular

Standard

$179per visit
  • Deep clean
  • Up to 4 rooms
  • Inside appliances
  • Baseboards & light fixtures
  • Floor mopping & scrubbing
  • 100% satisfaction guarantee
Get Started

Premium

$299per visit
  • Full property clean
  • All rooms included
  • Carpet shampooing
  • Window washing (interior)
  • Move-out ready
  • Same-day available
Get Started

WHERE WE WORK

Service Area

We proudly serve homes and businesses across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. If your city is not listed, contact us — we likely serve your area too.

What Clients Say

"ProClean has been cleaning my home for 3 years. Always thorough, on time, and they use eco-friendly products. My house has never looked better!"

Homeowner • March 2026

"We hired ProClean for our 5,000 sq ft office. They clean after hours so there's no disruption. Staff is professional and reliable."

Robert Chen

Office Manager • February 2026

"Managing 20 rental properties, I need consistent cleaning between tenants. ProClean delivers every single time. Highly recommend!"

Property Manager • January 2026
